input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.9.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.9.1
            TITLE: the design judges will:

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.9.1: The Design Judges will:
S.4.9.1 The Design Judges will: 
a. Evaluate the engineering effort based upon the team’s Design Documents, discussion 
with the team, and an inspection of the vehicle 
b. Inspect the vehicle to determine if the design concepts are adequate and appropriate for 
the application (relative to the objectives stated in the rules).  
c. Deduct points if the team cannot adequately explain the engineering and construction of 
the vehicle

final_answer: rule S.4.9.1: The Design Judges will: S.4.9.1 The Design Judges will: a. Evaluate the engineering effort based upon the team’s Design Documents, discussion with the team, and an inspection of the vehicle b. Inspect the vehicle to determine if the design concepts are adequate and appropriate for the application (relative to the objectives stated in the rules). c. Deduct points if the team cannot adequately explain the engineering and construction of the vehicle
